code: import{createStore,applyMiddleware}from'redux';import logger from'redux-logger';import{persistStore}from'redux-persist';import rootReducer from"./root.reducer";var middlewares=[];if(process.env.NODE_ENV==='development'){console.log(process.env.NODE_ENV);middlewares.push(logger);}export var store=createStore(rootReducer,applyMiddleware.apply(void 0,middlewares));export var persistor=persistStore(store);
